<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Validate Package Tag<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Validate that a tag ref matches the package.json version.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                | Description                                        | Required | Default        |
|---------------------|----------------------------------------------------|----------|----------------|
| `tag-name`          | Tag name to validate. Defaults to GITHUB_REF_NAME. | `false`  | ` `            |
| `tag-prefix`        | Prefix to strip before comparing to package.json.  | `false`  | `v`            |
| `package-json`      | Path to package.json.                              | `false`  | `package.json` |
| `working-directory` | Directory containing package.json.                 | `false`  | `.`            |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/validate-package-tag" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Validate tag matches package version"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/validate-package-tag@main"
   with:
    tag-name: "${{ github.ref_name }}"
```

<!--/usage-->
